Container.Name: OpenStreetMap-Tile-Server
Container.Overview:
A production-ready OpenStreetMap tile server running inside a single Docker container. Includes PostgreSQL, osm2pgsql, renderd, and Apache.
FIRST RUN: Set Post Arguments to [import] and place your .osm.pbf file in the OSM Data path before starting. After import completes, change Post Arguments to [run] and restart.
Download map data (PBF files) from https://download.geofabrik.de/

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for tile server and slippy map demo.

Config.Name: Database Storage
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database storage. Requires significant disk space depending on region size.

Config.Name: OSM Data (PBF Import)
Config.Description: Path to your .osm.pbf file downloaded from Geofabrik. Only needed on first run (import mode).

Config.Name: Custom Style
Config.Description: Optional: Mount a custom CartoCSS/Mapnik style directory.

Config.Name: Osmosis State (Live Updates)
Config.Description: Required only if UPDATES is set to enabled.

Config.Name: Render Threads
Config.Description: Number of threads used for rendering tiles. Match to your CPU core count.

Config.Name: Live OSM Updates
Config.Description: Set to [enabled] to keep the map updated via OSM diffs. Requires the Osmosis path to be set.

Config.Name: Allow Cors
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable CORS headers (useful when embedding tiles in web apps).
